headline: Is DexCom Stock Underperforming the Dow?
summary: DexCom has lagged behind the Dow Jones over the past year, yet analysts remain highly bullish about the stock’s outlook.

raw.headline: Is DexCom Stock Underperforming the Dow?
raw.summary: DexCom has lagged behind the Dow Jones over the past year, yet analysts remain highly bullish about the stock’s outlook.

headline: Stifel Maintains Buy on DexCom, Raises Price Target to $90
summary: Stifel  analyst Jonathan Block   maintains DexCom (NASDAQ:DXCM) with a Buy and raises the price target from $85 to $90.

raw.headline: Stifel Maintains Buy on DexCom, Raises Price Target to $90
raw.summary: Stifel  analyst Jonathan Block   maintains DexCom (NASDAQ:DXCM) with a Buy and raises the price target from $85 to $90.

headline: Dexcom buys Nutrisense; Insulet rolls out patch pump update
summary: In the lead-up to the American Diabetes Association’s Scientific Sessions, Dexcom announced an acquisition and Insulet improved the software for its latest patch pump.
